overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval great hall or classroom with gothic architecture, where students in robes study at wooden tables. Warm natural light streams through tall stained glass windows, illuminating the vaulted wooden ceiling and ornate rugs.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with study tables

agents.ego_description: standing still in the hall observing students studying at their tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing in the middle of the hall facing away from camera
student in dark robes sitting at a wooden table reading in the foreground

entered.detail: high arched ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and trusses
tall pointed-arch windows with intricate tracery allowing bright daylight to enter
ornate wrought iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple candle holders
long dark wooden study tables arranged throughout the hall
grey stone walls with dark wood paneling on the lower half
rectangular framed paintings hanging on the wall between the windows
ornate blue and red patterned carpet covering the central floor area

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a grand medieval hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings and gothic windows. Students in dark robes sit at wooden tables studying, while warm light filters through the stained glass. The space features ornate rugs, iron chandeliers, and portraits on the stone walls, creating a scholarly atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, immersive gaze into a grand medieval hall that maintains a scholarly and timeless atmosphere. It begins with a stationary view of the vast space, where high vaulted wooden ceilings and gothic windows define the architecture. As the eye lingers, the warm light filtering through stained glass illuminates students in dark robes diligently studying at heavy wooden tables. The scene then expands to reveal the rich textures of the environment, from ornate rugs on the floor to iron chandeliers and portraits adorning the stone walls.
